question: Can lattice theory be formalized and empirically tested for swarm, and does the naive monotonicity assumption (T-M1/T-M2) hold?
prediction: Swarm state is a complete lattice with monotone inflationary operator; all commits are additive
actual: Only 8.7% of commits are syntactically monotone. Knowledge lattice is monotone except compaction. Quotient lattice L_know/~_compact is the correct model. T-M1 REFINED (retraction model), T-M2 PARTIALLY FALSIFIED.
diff: Massive gap between syntactic and knowledge-level monotonicity. Three-lattice model replaces single-lattice assumption. Compaction formalized as lattice retraction, not violation.
